channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: The Cloudward Crew Confers
item.description:
The crew of Dimension 20 chats about what it takes to bring the world of Cloudward, Ho! to life.

Duration: 1:09:54

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, derek christiansen, carlos luna, rick perry, michael schaubach, skye smith, denise valentine, jon wolf

item.title: Santa the Whole Time
item.description:
The cast reflect on the finale of the season, Lou reads a book, and the tentacles make their return.

Duration: 11:53

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: A Dirty Way to Say Biscuits
item.description:
The cast discuss the nature of the Corrodi, the battle with Straka, and invent creative new insults.

Duration: 24:47

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, Cloudward Ho!, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
